name: Rebecca Energy Color Palette
description: Cozy autumnal forest palette embodying twilight magic, whimsical yet grounded aesthetic for Human Design chart visualization

philosophy.aesthetic: Cozy autumnal forest, twilight magic, enchanted but accessible
philosophy.tone: Warm and approachable, playful yet grounded

mystical_purple.name: Mystical Purple
mystical_purple.description: Deep twilight purple for consciousness, unconscious design activations, mystical elements

twilight_deep.name: Twilight Deep
twilight_deep.description: Darker purple for shadows, depth, unconscious realms

twilight_light.name: Twilight Light
twilight_light.description: Lighter purple for highlights, subtle mystical touches

autumn_gold.name: Autumn Gold
autumn_gold.description: Warm golden amber for conscious activations, personality side, energetic presence

autumn_amber.name: Autumn Amber
autumn_amber.description: Rich amber for electromagnetic connections, active channels, energy flow

harvest_light.name: Harvest Light
harvest_light.description: Soft golden glow for subtle warmth, hover states on conscious elements

forest_green.name: Forest Green
forest_green.description: Grounded forest green for growth, stability, defined centers

moss_deep.name: Moss Deep
moss_deep.description: Deep mossy green for backgrounds, grounding elements

sage_light.name: Sage Light
sage_light.description: Soft sage for undefined centers in light mode, gentle presence

earth_brown.name: Earth Brown
earth_brown.description: Warm earth brown for foundations, stability, grounding

bark_deep.name: Bark Deep
bark_deep.description: Deep bark brown for text, strong grounding

sand_light.name: Sand Light
sand_light.description: Warm sandy beige for light backgrounds, gentle foundation

conscious_personality.description: Conscious activations (personality side, what we're aware of)
conscious_personality.rationale: Warm golden tones represent conscious awareness, like sunlight illuminating what we can see

unconscious_design.description: Unconscious activations (design side, what operates beneath awareness)
unconscious_design.rationale: Deep purples evoke twilight mysteries, the unconscious realm we're discovering

defined_centers.rationale: Saturated forest green shows strong, stable presence; gold accents show activation

undefined_centers.description: Centers that are open, receptive to conditioning
undefined_centers.rationale: Muted, softer tones show openness and receptivity rather than fixed energy

active_channels.rationale: Rich amber shows energetic flow and electromagnetic connection

inactive_channels.rationale: Very subtle presence shows potential but not activation

gate_activations.rationale: Clear differentiation between conscious (gold) and unconscious (purple) activations

person_a.rationale: Primary gold shows 'home' person or chart owner

person_b.rationale: Purple differentiates second person, maintaining Rebecca Energy aesthetic

composite_overlap.description: Where two people's energies create something new together
composite_overlap.rationale: Green represents new growth from relationship alchemy

electromagnetic_connection.rationale: Amber energy shows live connection and flow between people

current_transits.description: Current planetary transits overlaying natal chart
current_transits.rationale: Lighter purple shows transient cosmic weather over stable natal chart

transit_gates.rationale: Distinguished from natal activations while maintaining mystical theme

ui_component_contrast.requirement: WCAG AA for UI components and graphical objects

notes: All primary text combinations pass WCAG AAA (7:1) in both light and dark modes
Secondary text passes WCAG AA (4.5:1) in both modes
UI component colors (centers, channels, gates) pass WCAG AA (3:1) against backgrounds
Focus indicators use high-contrast autumn gold (#D4A046) with 3px outline
Muted text (tertiary) intentionally lower contrast but still maintains 3.6:1+ ratio
Interactive states increase brightness/saturation to improve discoverability
Color is never the only means of conveying information (patterns, labels, icons used)

css_variables.description: CSS custom properties for easy integration

human_design_center.description: Styling for a defined vs undefined center

gate_activation.description: Styling for conscious vs unconscious gate activations

interaction_chart.description: Color coding for person A, person B, and composite

do: Use warm autumn tones (gold, amber) for conscious/personality elements
Use mystical purples for unconscious/design elements
Use forest greens for grounded, stable, defined energy
Mute colors (lower saturation, add opacity) for undefined/open centers
Increase brightness on hover to show interactivity
Use consistent focus indicators (3px gold outline) for accessibility
Maintain cozy, warm feeling through earth tones and soft transitions
Test all color combinations for WCAG AA contrast before using
dont: Don't use pure black or pure white - stay in the warm earth tone palette
Don't use colors as the only way to convey information (add labels, patterns)
Don't use neon or overly saturated colors - keep it cozy and grounded
Don't ignore dark mode - ensure all colors work in both light and dark themes
Don't use red/green alone for semantic meaning (colorblind considerations)
Don't sacrifice contrast for aesthetics - accessibility is non-negotiable
Don't mix cold blues with the warm autumn palette
Don't use more than 3-4 colors in a single component - keep it clear
metaphors_and_vibes: Conscious (gold) = Sunlight on autumn leaves, what we can see and know
Unconscious (purple) = Twilight mysteries, what operates beneath awareness
Defined (forest green) = Strong oak tree, reliable and grounded
Undefined (sage) = Open meadow, receptive to what comes through
Active channels (amber) = Energy flowing like golden sap through tree veins
Electromagnetic connections (amber pulse) = Hummingbird wings creating magic between charts
Transit overlays (twilight light) = Cosmic weather passing through your steady forest

technical_notes.color_spaces: Colors provided in hex (web), RGB (0-255), and HSL (H: 0-360°, S/L: 0-100%)
technical_notes.format_validation: All hex codes are 6-digit uppercase format (#RRGGBB)
technical_notes.accessibility_testing: Contrast ratios calculated using WCAG 2.1 formula: (L1 + 0.05) / (L2 + 0.05)
technical_notes.browser_support: CSS custom properties (CSS Variables) require modern browsers (IE11+)
technical_notes.fallbacks: Provide fallback colors for older browsers if needed
technical_notes.opacity_handling: Opacity values provided separately for layering control
